title: RemoteControlIOConfig
description:
RemoteControlIOConfig

Remote Control Input Output Configuration

The following is the procedure to assign the remote control functions to the I/O system.

(1)   Select [Controller] from the [Setup] menu-[System Configuration] and display the [System Configuration] dialog box. Select [Controller]-[Remote]-[Inputs] or [Outputs].

(2)   For each input or output you want to use for remote control, click on the Input # or Output # cell for the desired signal, then click the dropdown arrow and select a bit number in the list.

(3)   Click the [Apply] button to save the new setting, then click the [Close] button.

For details on the dialog setting, refer to section 5.13.2 [System Configuration] (Setup menu) - [Setup]-[System Configuration]-[Remote].
